\tzpentry{ID5444}{Holonomy Quantum State Functional}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5444 introduces Holonomy Quantum State Functional as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \Psi = \int_{S}^{S^2} \left( \sum_{n=1}^{\infty} \frac{(S \cdot x)^n}{n!} \right) dx + \oint_{C} \frac{1}{z - (S+|S|i)} dz \end{equation}
